text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Phew… Bakushin O-senpai and Flight-senpai's dancing was so… 
So beautiful…!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: It really was! Heck, I can still feel their dancing echoing in my head… You can tell they've won before.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me. We're far from the only people moved by their 
performance. Apparently there's some girls going around trying to find 
them so they can talk——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ! Oh——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(I see, Flight-san—— So you're off to tell her. 
To give her a blessing yourself——)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm? 
I don't see Bakushin O-senpai or Flight-senpai anywhere. 
Perhaps they went off somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ——Yes… perhaps they did.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I doubt we'll able to find them. 
At least, not for a little while.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at that! 
We walked so far we ended up at the track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
…Um, Flight-san? 
You said you had something to discuss, but… 
What, exactly?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
……… 
———— 
Well, Bakushin O-chan…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
…Sakura Bakushin O-san. 
Will you listen to what I have to say?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
I've always—— wanted to be next to you. 
To be at your side, now and forever.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: I want to race you, side by side, with sparks flying between us! "Because it's you. It has to be you." ——I want the two of us to feel that way forever.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
And I know. For Umamusume like us, everything has 
to end eventually. It's impossible for us to keep 
on running forever. ——I know that, but I——!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No! Nothing is impossible!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We can stay side by side! 
We can keep on running forever and ever!! 
I don't know how! But we can make it happen!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget! I am Sakura Bakushin O, the King of Speed!! 
And there's one thing you should know, Flight-san!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A King is someone who can make anything and everything possible!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
!! 
Bakushin O… chan——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
……Haha… Hahahaha! 
Then you'd better not forget, I'm the Queen of Speed.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
And that means I can make anything and everything happen too. 
As long as we're together… 
…There's nothing we can't do.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
If you really mean it, then… 
…Bakushin O-chan. 
I have something to give you——

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ……No, I have something to give you first!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Will you do me the honor of accepting this brooch, Flight-san!!?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
——!? 
W-Wh… what? 
Bakushin O-chan…!?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wear my brooch on your neck, and I will wear yours on mine! 
This way, there's nothing for you to fear! 
Because these brooches will be our proof to the world!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Proof that Sakura Bakushin O and North Flight will always shine 
together side by side, a date for all eternity!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
………………… 
I… Oh, you… 
Bakushin O-chan, you're too much…!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
You took the words right out of my mouth! 
Saying it faster than me… That's no fair——!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Hey—— Let's run, Bakushin O-chan. 
If we're together, we can go anywhere, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course we can! So long as we're together!!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Always, and forever—— To the ends of the earth.
